ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the token (e.g., SXP-CCC, TWT-8C2) */,
  "contract_address" TEXT /* Contract address of the token */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the token (e.g., SXP, TWT) */,
  "token_type" TEXT /* Type of the token (e.g., BEP20, BEP2) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the token was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the token was last updated */,
  "decimals" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places for the token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bep20_tokens" (
  "bep20_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BEP20 token */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the token this BEP20 token belongs to */,
  "circulation" REAL /* Circulation of the BEP20 token */,
  "used_amount" REAL /* Used amount of the BEP20 token */,
  "used_ratio" REAL /* Used ratio of the BEP20 token */,
  "market_capacity" REAL /* Market capacity of the BEP20 token */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the BEP20 token */,
  "liquidity_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the token's liquidity to its total supply */,
  "trading_pair" TEXT /* Common trading pairs for the token (e.g., SXP/USD, TWT/USD) */,
  "last_traded" TEXT /* Date and time of the last trade */,
  "volume_24h" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume */,
  "market_cap_change_24h" REAL /* 24-hour change in market capitalization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bep20_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bep20_tokens_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bep2_tokens" (
  "bep2_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BEP2 token */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the token this BEP2 token belongs to */,
  "circulation" REAL /* Circulation of the BEP2 token */,
  "market_capacity" REAL /* Market capacity of the BEP2 token */,
  "liquidity_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the token's liquidity to its total supply */,
  "trading_pair" TEXT /* Common trading pairs for the token (e.g., SXP/USD, TWT/USD) */,
  "last_traded" TEXT /* Date and time of the last trade */,
  "volume_24h" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume */,
  "market_cap_change_24h" REAL /* 24-hour change in market capitalization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bep2_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bep2_tokens_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the token this price belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the token */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the price was last updated */,
  "price_change_24h" REAL /* 24-hour change in price */,
  "price_change_7d" REAL /* 7-day change in price */,
  "price_change_30d" REAL /* 30-day change in price */,
  "price_change_percent_24h" REAL /* 24-hour percentage change in price */,
  "price_change_percent_7d" REAL /* 7-day percentage change in price */,
  "price_change_percent_30d" REAL /* 30-day percentage change in price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rebalancing" (
  "rebalancing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rebalancing entry */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the token this rebalancing entry belongs to */,
  "need_rebalancing" INTEGER /* Whether the token needs rebalancing */,
  "last_rebalanced" TEXT /* Date when the token was last rebalanced */,
  "rebalancing_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rebalancing (e.g., Market Stability, Supply Adjustment) */,
  "rebalancing_effect" TEXT /* Effect of the rebalancing (e.g., Increase Supply, Decrease Supply) */,
  "rebalancing_amount" REAL /* Amount of tokens rebalanced */,
  "rebalancing_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the rebalancing event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rebalancing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rebalancing_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "token_holders" (
  "holder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token holder */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the token this holder holds */,
  "balance" REAL /* Balance of the token held by the holder */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the holder's balance was last updated */,
  "holder_name" TEXT /* Name of the token holder */,
  "holder_address" TEXT /* Address of the token holder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the holder record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the holder record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_token_holders_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume entry */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the token this volume belongs to */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the token */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the volume was last updated */,
  "volume_change_24h" REAL /* 24-hour change in trading volume */,
  "volume_change_percent_24h" REAL /* 24-hour percentage change in trading volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the token this market data belongs to */,
  "market_capacity" REAL /* Market capacity of the token */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the market data was last updated */,
  "market_cap_change_24h" REAL /* 24-hour change in market capitalization */,
  "market_cap_change_percent_24h" REAL /* 24-hour percentage change in market capitalization */,
  "high_24h" REAL /* 24-hour high price */,
  "low_24h" REAL /* 24-hour low price */,
  "volume_change_24h" REAL /* 24-hour change in trading volume */,
  "volume_change_percent_24h" REAL /* 24-hour percentage change in trading volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
